Frequently Asked Questions

How long does it take to feel the effects? ▼
Most dreamers report noticing deeper, more vivid dreams within 3-5 days of consistent use. For maximum benefits, take for at least 2 weeks.
Are there any side effects? ▼
Dream Complex is made from natural mushroom extracts and is well-tolerated by most people. Some may experience vivid dreams (which is the goal!). If you're on medications, consult your doctor first.
Can I take it every night? ▼
Yes! Dream Complex is designed for nightly use. Take 2 gummies 30 minutes before bed. Most people find it works best with consistent use.
Is it vegan and gluten-free? ▼
Absolutely. All Dream Complex gummies are 100% vegan and gluten-free, with no artificial colors or flavors.
What if I'm not satisfied? ▼
We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you don't experience deeper, more vivid dreams, we'll refund your purchase, no questions asked.
